category_sources: source_facts.description says Kubernetes cluster resource sanitizer; official site https://popeyecli.io describes Popeye as a Kubernetes cluster resource sanitizer and documents Kubernetes scanning output.
display_name_sources: Official site title and source_facts.name use Popeye/popeye: https://popeyecli.io.
docs_sources: Official Popeye site is the main documentation surface with installation, Docker usage, output formats, and report details: https://popeyecli.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/derailed/popeye, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes resource sanitizer; official site documents cluster scans, Docker usage, output formats, reports, and Kubernetes compatibility.
